title: Sanji and Zoro Reach Their Limits
description: On pages 30–33, this part focuses on Unknown person #29, Luffy, Unknown person #30, Unknown person #31, Unknown person #32, King as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did you throw some twigs on that fire?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Each and every one of you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I still couldn't even touch him... his league...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Come at me at any time...

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 18 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
